vibe: Elite, professional, and precise. A high-authority platform that feels like a blend of modern finance and luxury tech.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:border-[#CBD5E1] transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl
surface_strategies.dashboard_widgets: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] p-8 flex flex-col h-full rounded-2xl
surface_strategies.viability_score_card: relative overflow-hidden border border-[#E2E8F0] bg-white p-10 rounded-3xl shadow-sm

component_instructions.buttons: Softly rounded (rounded-xl). Primary CTA: bg-[#0047AB] text-white hover:bg-[#003580] shadow-md hover:shadow-lg. Secondary: border-2 border-[#0F172A] text-[#0F172A] bg-transparent hover:bg-[#0F172A] hover:text-white.
component_instructions.readiness_quiz: Minimalist bento-grid layout. Large, airy typography. Subtle animations between steps.
component_instructions.franchise_compare: High-density data bento. Clear distinction between metrics using subtle background tints. Use JetBrains Mono for data.
component_instructions.ai_explainer: Inline chat experience with soft-blue conversation bubbles. Clean typing indicators.
component_instructions.roadmap: Horizontal stepper with refined connectors. Focused, distraction-free steps.
component_instructions.owner_dashboard: Clean, modular dashboard. High-level KPIs in large bento cards. List view with plenty of white space.

hero_background.description: Minimalist corporate office lobby, bright and airy.

instructions_to_main_agent: Adhere to 'Titanium Silk' aesthetic: prioritize brightness, white space, and refined borders.
Use '#0047AB' (Deep Cobalt) for all mission-critical UI elements.
Maintain consistently rounded corners (rounded-xl/2xl) to soften the high-contrast professional look.
Ensure 'Plus Jakarta Sans' is fully integrated as the primary heading font.
Add transition-all and duration-300 to all interactive cards and buttons for a premium feel.
Use data-testid on every interactive element for testing consistency.
The brand name is 'Franchisebridge' (singular word, lowercase 'b').
